name: libauthen-sasl-perl
title: libauthen-sasl-perl
description:
Authen::SASL - SASL Authentication framework
SASL is a generic mechanism for authentication used by several network
protocols. Authen::SASL provides an implementation framework that all
protocols should be able to share.
.
The framework allows different implementations of the connection class
to be plugged in. At the time of writing there were two such plugins
in Debian:
- Authen::SASL::Perl (in this package)
This module implements several mechanisms and is implemented
entirely in Perl.
- Authen::SASL::XS (in the libauthen-sasl-xs-perl package)
This module uses the Cyrus SASL C-library (both version 1 and 2 are
supported).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libauthen-sasl-perl because Authen::SASL - SASL Authentication framework.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libauthen-sasl-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libauthen-sasl-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libauthen-sasl-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
